# Daniel J. Faiella Insurance Advisors

> Independent Medicare, life, long-term care, health and annuity insurance broker based in Carson City, Nevada, serving all of Northern Nevada: Reno, Sparks, Minden, Gardnerville, Genoa, Dayton, Fernley, Fallon, and the Nevada side of Lake Tahoe (Incline Village to Stateline). Daniel teaches first, then compares A+ rated carriers side by side. Consultations and plan comparisons are free — the broker is paid by the carrier the client chooses, and premiums are the same either way.

Contact: call or text 775-315-5572 · faiella.daniel@gmail.com · Carson City, NV
Google Business Profile: https://maps.google.com/?cid=7820892945307879894
Not affiliated with or endorsed by the U.S. government or the federal Medicare program.

## Services

- [Medicare — Advantage, Supplement (Medigap) & Part D](https://faiellainsurance.com/services/medicare): Plan comparison, enrollment-period guidance, turning-65 help, network checks for Carson Tahoe, Renown, Carson Valley Health and Barton.
- [Life Insurance — Term, Whole Life, IUL & Final Expense](https://faiellainsurance.com/services/life-insurance): Honest comparison of term, whole life, indexed universal life, final expense and living benefits.
- [Annuities & Retirement Income Planning](https://faiellainsurance.com/services/annuities): Fixed and indexed annuities, immediate income (SPIA), guaranteed lifetime withdrawal benefits, RMD planning.
- [Long-Term Care Insurance](https://faiellainsurance.com/services/long-term-care): Traditional LTC, hybrid life + LTC, short-term care; Medicare does not cover ongoing custodial care.
- [Health Insurance & Income Protection](https://faiellainsurance.com/services/health-insurance): Under-65 health coverage, hospital indemnity, disability income, dental/vision/hearing, critical illness.

## Service Areas

- [Carson City, NV](https://faiellainsurance.com/service-areas/carson-city-nv): Home base — Medicare, PERS retiree coordination, Carson Tahoe network questions.
- [Reno & Sparks, NV](https://faiellainsurance.com/service-areas/reno-nv): Renown and Prominence network guidance, health, life and annuities.
- [Minden & Gardnerville, NV](https://faiellainsurance.com/service-areas/minden-gardnerville-nv): Carson Valley / Douglas County Medicare and senior coverage.
- [Dayton, NV](https://faiellainsurance.com/service-areas/dayton-nv): Lyon County in-person reviews.
- [Lake Tahoe (NV side)](https://faiellainsurance.com/service-areas/lake-tahoe-nv): Incline Village to Stateline, including Barton Health questions.
- [All service areas](https://faiellainsurance.com/service-areas)

## Guides & Articles

- [Medicare Advantage vs. Supplement in Nevada](https://faiellainsurance.com/guides/medicare-advantage-vs-supplement-nevada): Cornerstone guide to the biggest Medicare decision.
- [How an Annuity With Guaranteed Lifetime Withdrawals Can Pay Your IRA's RMDs](https://faiellainsurance.com/blog/annuities-guaranteed-lifetime-withdrawals-rmds): IRA aggregation rule, SECURE 2.0, sequence-of-returns protection.
- [Medicare's GLP-1 Bridge Program (July 2026 – December 2027)](https://faiellainsurance.com/blog/medicare-glp-1-bridge-program-2026): $50/month weight-management coverage — eligibility, covered drugs, fine print.
- [Term vs. Whole Life vs. IUL: How to Actually Choose](https://faiellainsurance.com/blog/term-vs-whole-vs-iul-life-insurance): A framework for choosing life insurance.
- [Blog index](https://faiellainsurance.com/blog)

## About

- [About Daniel Faiella](https://faiellainsurance.com/about): Independent licensed insurance advisor and educator; works for clients, not a single carrier.
